title: AP-Vizag Performance Security at 2.5% (SCC Override)
text_english: PERFORMANCE SECURITY (Construction Period): The Contractor SHALL — DURING the CONSTRUCTION PERIOD — PROVIDE to the Authority a PERFORMANCE SECURITY equal to {{ps_pct_of_bid}}% (default 2.5%) of the BID AMOUNT at the TIME of SIGNING the Contract — in the shape of an UNCONDITIONAL and IRREVOCABLE BANK GUARANTEE valid UNTIL {{ps_validity_post_dlp_days}} (default 60) DAYS AFTER COMPLETION of the DEFECT LIABILITY PERIOD AND the Authority's Engineer has CERTIFIED that ALL DEFECTS notified before end of period have been CORRECTED. NOTE: This 2.5% rate is a TENDER-LEVEL OVERRIDE BELOW the MPW 2022 standard 5-10% range; verifiers SHALL flag this as `PBG-Shortfall` WARNING unless a specific GO/SoPP relaxation is on file.

title: AP-Vizag Retention Money — 7.5% Running Bills with 5%/2.5% Split + BG Substitution Slabs
text_english: RETENTION MONEY (Construction Period): The Authority SHALL RETAIN from EACH PAYMENT due to the Contractor at {{retention_pct}}% (default 7.5%) of bill amount until completion of the Works. ON COMPLETION of WHOLE WORKS, of total amount retained: {{post_completion_release_pct}}% (default 5%) shall be RE-PAID along with FINAL BILL; balance {{dlp_retention_pct}}% (default 2.5%) shall be PAID after COMPLETION of the {{dlp_years}} (default 2)-YEAR DEFECT LIABILITY PERIOD. BG SUBSTITUTION: retention amount IN EXCESS of {{retention_floor_pct}}% (default 2.5%) of value of work done SHALL be RELEASED against UNCONDITIONAL BG in MULTIPLES of: ₹{{bg_multiple_lt100cr_lakh}} LAKHS (default ₹25 lakh) for contracts ≤ ₹100 crores; ₹{{bg_multiple_gt100cr_lakh}} LAKHS (default ₹50 lakh) for contracts > ₹100 crores — IF rate of progress is MAINTAINED.
